<!-- Generated by the find-srtr-historical workflow (23 agents). 2026-06-09. -->

# SRTR Historical PSR Retrieval Report

## 1. Bottom line

Yes — we can get every historical center-level PSR file we need, and the task premise (that the files were deleted) is wrong. The data was **not deleted; it was relocated** to a new host and path. SRTR/HRSA still serves the all-organ bulk PSR zips for every historical release at `https://srtr.hrsa.gov/Archives/PSRdownloads/csrs_tables_all/csrs_final_tables_<CODE>all.zip`. All 14 target release codes return HTTP 200 with valid 8.5–11.8 MB zips, and verification actually downloaded, unzipped, and parsed all 14 (plus the 2511 control): each contains the 8 genuine OLE2 per-organ Excel workbooks (KI, LI, HR, LU, PA, IN, HL, KP) with the center-level Table B7 / Tables B7-B8 sheets and the `SAL_TOTTX_C12` transplant-volume column. The only catch is an era-dependent schema shift: releases 2105 and newer have a dedicated "Table B7" sheet carrying `SAL_TOTTX_C12`, while 2011 and older split B7 across "Tables B7-B8 Center …" sheets and store `SAL_TOTTX_C12` in the "Table B6" sheet (and release 2006 lacks the `SAL_*` naming entirely). The Internet Archive Wayback Machine, data.gov, healthdata.gov, OPTN, and all academic repositories are dead ends for this data — do not pursue them.

## 2. Confirmed-retrievable (all verified end-to-end)

Every row below was downloaded, unzipped, and a member workbook opened with xlrd. The retrieval URL is the all-organ zip; each zip yields 8 per-organ `.xls` files. `SAL_TOTTX_C12` is present in **all** of them (location varies by era — see notes).

| release | organs in bundle | retrieval URL | `SAL_TOTTX_C12`? (where) | zip size |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1811 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `https://srtr.hrsa.gov/Archives/PSRdownloads/csrs_tables_all/csrs_final_tables_1811all.zip` | Yes — in **Table B6** | 8,501,630 |
| 1905 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_1905all.zip` | Yes — in **Table B6** | 8,760,776 |
| 1911 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_1911all.zip` | Yes — in **Table B6** | 10,116,763 |
| 2006 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2006all.zip` | **No** `SAL_TOTTX_C12` (pre-`SAL_*` schema) — see Coverage | 10,081,869 |
| 2011 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2011all.zip` | Yes — in **Table B6** | 10,023,909 |
| 2105 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2105all.zip` | Yes — in **Table B6** (B7 sheet exists but col is in B6) | 10,318,336 |
| 2111 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2111all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 10,519,506 |
| 2205 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2205all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,207,477 |
| 2211 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2211all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,631,034 |
| 2305 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2305all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,662,940 |
| 2311 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2311all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,720,050 |
| 2405 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2405all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,719,488 |
| 2411 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2411all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 10,387,915 |
| 2505 | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2505all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,762,144 |
| 2511 (control) | KI,LI,HR,LU,PA,IN,HL,KP | `…/csrs_final_tables_2511all.zip` | **Yes — in Table B7** | 11,762,714 |

Notes on structure:
- **Member filenames inside the zip:** `csrs_final_tables_<CODE>_<ORG>.xls` for ORG in {HL,HR,IN,KI,KP,LI,LU,PA}.
- **Nesting is not uniform.** 1811 stores members at the zip root; 2105 (and several others) nest them under a `csrs_final_tables_<CODE>all/` subdir. A robust extractor must junk paths (`unzip -j`) or glob `*_<ORG>.xls`.
- **No working per-organ direct path for historical codes.** `…/csrs_tables/csrs_final_tables_<CODE>_<ORG>.xls` returns 404 for everything except the current release 2511. The current-release single-file pattern (verified USABLE) is `https://srtr.hrsa.gov/Archives/PSRdownloads/csrs_tables/csrs_final_tables_2511_<ORG>.xls`.

**Whole-directory enumeration:** the landing page `https://srtr.hrsa.gov/transplant-professionals/program-specific-report/program-specific-reports-psr/` carries the "Archived National PSR Data Reports" period dropdown (July 2012 → July 2025). The archive extends earlier than the target list — `csrs_final_tables_1207all.zip` was confirmed HTTP 200 (9,013,357 bytes) — so codes before 1811 are also available if deeper temporal validation is wanted.

**GitHub secondary source (kidney only, useful as a redundant mirror):** `harryreyesnieva/p8105_final_project` hosts validated KI workbooks at `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/harryreyesnieva/p8105_final_project/main/data/csrs_final_tables_<CODE>_KI.xls` for codes 1811, 1905, 1911, 2006, 2105 (plus bonus pre-1811 KI: 1207–1808, with irregular filenames like `csrs_final_tables1207KI.XLS`). All-organs only for 2006, under `data/old_data/`. It does **not** cover 2111/2205/2211/2305/2311/2405/2411/2505. Prefer the HRSA zips; keep this only as a fallback/archival copy.

## 3. Coverage

Target codes: 1811, 1905, 1911, 2006, 2011, 2105, 2111, 2205, 2211, 2305, 2311, 2405, 2411, 2505 — **all 14 obtainable**, all 8 organs each (KI, LI, HR, LU, PA, IN, HL, KP).

| code | obtainable? | organs | `SAL_TOTTX_C12` usable? |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1811 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B6) |
| 1905 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B6) |
| 1911 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B6) |
| 2006 | Yes (file present) | all 8 | **No** — 2006 vintage predates the `SAL_*` code scheme; `SAL_TOTTX_C12` absent. B7 content exists under "Tables B7-B8 …" sheets but the specific transplant-volume column is not present under that name. Treat 2006 as **partial** — usable for B7-family metrics only, not for `SAL_TOTTX_C12`. |
| 2011 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B6) |
| 2105 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B6; dedicated "Table B7" sheet also present) |
| 2111 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2205 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2211 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2305 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2311 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2405 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2411 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |
| 2505 | Yes | all 8 | Yes (Table B7) |

**Nothing is missing** at the file level — every target code and every organ is downloadable from the HRSA zip channel. The only true gap is the **`SAL_TOTTX_C12` value for release 2006**, which does not exist in that vintage's schema regardless of source. For that one release, derive the transplant-rate metric from the "Tables B7-B8 …" / "Table B6" equivalents or treat 2006 as a B7-metrics-only data point.

**Schema eras the parser must handle:**
- **Newer (2111 → 2511):** dedicated `Table B7` sheet; read `SAL_TOTTX_C12` directly from its header row.
- **Transitional (2105):** `Table B7` sheet exists, but `SAL_TOTTX_C12` lives in `Table B6` (col ~121).
- **Older (1811, 1905, 1911, 2011):** no `Table B7` sheet; B7 content is in `Tables B7-B8 Center <=1yr` / `>=2yr` / `Counts Center`; read `SAL_TOTTX_C12` from `Table B6` (col ~121).
- **Oldest (2006):** no `SAL_*` columns at all; `Tables B7-B8 …` sheets use `TPC_*_PCT*` percentile columns only.

## 4. Recommended retrieval recipe

Single channel, no Wayback, no API hunting. Outline for a `fetch_srtr_archived.py`:

1. **Enumerate codes.** Hardcode the 14 target codes (optionally add 1207–1805 from the landing-page dropdown for deeper history).
2. **Download each zip:**
   `GET https://srtr.hrsa.gov/Archives/PSRdownloads/csrs_tables_all/csrs_final_tables_{CODE}all.zip`
   Verify: HTTP 200 (or 206 on Range), `Content-Type: application/x-zip-compressed`, leading bytes `PK\x03\x04`, and content-length in the 8.5–11.8 MB band (reject anything tiny → that would be a soft-404, though none were observed).
3. **Extract robustly.** Use `unzip -j` (junk paths) or, in Python, iterate `ZipFile.namelist()` and match `re.search(r'_(KI|LI|HR|LU|PA|IN|HL|KP)\.xls$', name, re.I)` so both root-level (1811) and nested (`csrs_final_tables_<CODE>all/`, e.g. 2105) layouts work. Save as `csrs_final_tables_<CODE>_<ORG>.xls`.
4. **Validate each member.** `file` should report "CDFV2 Microsoft Excel" / OLE2 magic `D0CF11E0`; open with `xlrd` (these are legacy `.xls`, so `xlrd.open_workbook`, not openpyxl).
5. **Era-aware column extraction.** Build a sheet/column resolver:
   - try sheet `Table B7` → find header cell `SAL_TOTTX_C12`;
   - else fall back to sheet `Table B6` → `SAL_TOTTX_C12`;
   - else (2006) record B7-family `TPC_*_PCT*` metrics and flag `SAL_TOTTX_C12 = unavailable`.
   Key on the header string, not a fixed column index (observed near col 121 in older files but do not hardcode).
6. **Mirror now.** All zips share `last-modified 2026-05-19` (a bulk re-upload), so HRSA is actively maintaining the archive — but to avoid future breakage, pull and store all 15 zips (14 targets + 2511 control) immediately. Optionally also clone the GitHub p8105 repo as a redundant kidney mirror.
7. **Gap handling.** Only real gap is `SAL_TOTTX_C12` for 2006 — document it as schema-absent and either omit 2006 from the volume-rate time series or substitute the B7-family equivalent with a footnote.

## 5. Dead ends (do not re-investigate)

- **Internet Archive Wayback Machine (CDX) — for center-level PSR `.xls`:** zero usable captures. Only 4 `csrs` URLs exist in the entire srtr.org Wayback index and every one is a captured IIS 404 page (~800–1245 bytes, `text/html`), not the real OLE2 file. The crawler only visited srtr.org after the 2024 migration deleted the old paths. (Wayback does hold genuine **OSR / OPO-level** `.xlsx` for codes 1701/2011/2211/2411/2505/2511 and pre-2015 per-center PSR **PDFs** — but neither is the requested center-level Table B7 `.xls`. Ignore for this purpose.)
- **data.gov CKAN:** `/api/3/action/package_search` now returns 404; does not mirror `csrs_final_tables`.
- **healthdata.gov (Socrata):** "SRTR program specific" → 0 results; only unrelated journal records. Does not host the files.
- **OPTN national-data page:** returns 403 to programmatic fetch; no mirror anyway.
- **Academic repositories (Harvard Dataverse, Zenodo, figshare, OSF, Dryad, ICPSR):** no raw per-center PSR Table B7. Closest hit (Harvard `doi:10.7910/DVN/28749`) is the SRTR Annual Data Report 2010–2012 (aggregate ADR), not program-specific center-level data — rejected.
- **Per-organ direct path for historical codes** (`…/Archives/PSRdownloads/csrs_tables/csrs_final_tables_<CODE>_<ORG>.xls`): 404 for all non-2511 codes. Use the `all.zip` bundles instead.
- **Old `www.srtr.org/assets/media/PSRdownloads/` path:** dead (this was the deletion that triggered the task). Superseded by `srtr.hrsa.gov/Archives/PSRdownloads/`.
